description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two deploy jobs that run only on the master branch. The first job, ubuntu-64bit-snap, uses the ubuntu:18.04 Docker image, runs apt-get update -qy, installs python3-pip snapcraft ghostscript vlc ffmpeg ttf-ubuntu-font-family, installs PySide2 mutagen python-vlc Pillow pyinstaller bs4 via pip3, builds the Linux binary with pyinstaller kihvim_linux.spec, builds a snap with snapcraft, decodes $SNAPCRAFT_LOGIN_FILE into snapcraft.login, logs into Snapcraft with snapcraft login --with snapcraft.login, and pushes the resulting *.snap to the edge channel. The second job, windows-64bit-nsis, uses the schnouki/pyinstaller-windows-ci:python3 image, runs apt-get update -qy, installs nsis unzip openssh-client sshpass, installs Python packages under wine with pip3, downloads and extracts ffmpeg and VLC Windows builds, downloads Ghostscript, runs wine pyinstaller kihvim_win.spec, creates an installer with makensis kihvim_win.nsi, exports SSHPASS=$USER_PASS, copies the generated Kihvim*Installer.exe to jonata@jonata.org:/home/jonata/kihvim.jonata.org/packages/ via sshpass scp, and stores the installer as an artifact (paths: Kihvim*Installer.exe, expire_in: 1 week). Both jobs are limited to the master branch.
